Shop privacy notice

Last updated: May 2026

What we collect for orders

  • Your compass scores, comparison actors, and print configuration — sent to our API to generate artwork and fulfil your order.
  • Shipping name and address — collected by Stripe at checkout and passed to Printful for delivery.
  • Email address — collected by Stripe for receipt and order communication.

Payment data

Card details are handled entirely by Stripe. We do not store card numbers.

Retention

Order records are kept for fulfilment and support. Generated artwork files are deleted after the fulfilment window (typically within 90 days).

Third parties

  • Stripe — payment processing
  • Printful — print and ship (UK/EU)

Your quiz answers on the compass

The main compass quiz does not transmit your answers anywhere. Only data you explicitly send at shop checkout is processed for merch.
